title: Lebanon's Salam in Turkey for talks with Erdogan
gist: Lebanon's PM Salam met Erdogan in Turkey; Pakistan and Qatar are reportedly seeking to revive US-Iran talks; and an election challenger to Netanyahu is gaining momentum.

insights.claim: Lebanon's Prime Minister Salam traveled to Turkey for talks with President Erdogan.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Signals warming Lebanon-Turkey ties amid regional realignment.

insights.claim: Pakistan and Qatar are reportedly seeking to revive US-Iran talks.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: A diplomatic revival could de-escalate the US-Iran conflict and ease energy risk.
insights.locator: Pakistan and Qatar are reportedly seeking

insights.claim: An election challenger to Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is gaining momentum.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Rising challenger introduces Israeli political-transition risk to watch.
insights.locator: an election challenger to Israeli Prime Minister
